title: Arkia's Sandwiches
description: A simple mod letting you craft sandwiches out of any food!
body:
# Arkia's Sandwiches

I couldn't find a mod for 1.21 that lets you make sandwiches out of any food that you want, so I made this mod.

## Features

The Sandwich Station block allows you to craft a sandwich with up to 9 ingredients, in addition to your bread of choice (Bread, Paper, Baked Potato, Honeycomb, Cookie, or even another Sandwich)

This block is crafted with 4 planks like a crafting table, with a sweet food and a savory food above (see JEI or similar for full recipe).

The sandwiches that you craft are bundles of sandwiches. To get the sandwiches out of them, just right-click to unpack them into 6 sandwiches.

If a food has a secondary effect, then the sandwich will have one as well. The effect(s) is procedurally generated to have roughly the same total effect as the combined ingredients (divided across 6 sandwiches). This is fairly customizable in the config.

## Config File
The config file uses *.json5 format to allow for comments. All comments in the config will currently be deleted and regenerated on each mod load, so they are _not_ suitable to use for making your own notes in the config (this may change in the future).

## Source
Github source coming soon!
